parameters.description: k value for NP-Complete problem, -1 if no k value wanted

get.summary: Returns a a reduction object with info for Garey and Johnsons's 3SAT to 3 Dimensional Matching reduction

200.description: Returns solution to the reduced 0-1 Integer Programming instance

API.Tools.ApiParameters.MapSolution.description: API parameters for the map solution routes.

major.description: The contributor's field of study or major

bio.description: A short biography describing the contributor's expertise

problemsContributed.description: List of all NP-Complete problems this contributor has worked on

solversCreated.description: List of all algorithm solvers this contributor has created

reductionsCreated.description: List of all problem reductions this contributor has created

totalContributions.description: Total count of all contributions (problems + solvers + reductions)

ContributorPortfolio.description: Represents a contributor's complete profile with personal details and all contributions
